The journey of developing strong teamwork

Our Past Events

SRE Goes to School

A visit to some schools in Bandung to spread awareness regarding the importance of understanding renewable energy.

SREnclusivity Week

A week full of webinar, panel discussion, competition, and grand seminar.

BONUS GEDE

Panel discussion with some policy makers to deliver our concern regarding renewable energy and energy transition.

Career Talks

Talk show with some renewable energy experts regarding green jobs.

Company Visit

One day visit to renewable energy related companies to get to know their product and work process.
